title: Australia stable baseline
description: Low-stress baseline case for Australia in 2023, used as a non-crisis calibration anchor in the operational suite.

scenario.question: Is Australia likely to remain broadly stable without a major crisis over the next two years?

historical_signals: Status_quo should dominate over direct escalation in a normal low-stress horizon.
The case exists to detect false positives when the suite drifts toward alarmism.
